texto: Cat's friends seemed like very sweet girls," Dad says."They were the bomb," I say fervently, and he looks back at me with raised eyebrows."'The bomb' is a good thing? Like 'sick'?"Duh," I reply, and Dad lets out a sigh."Thirteen-year-olds should come with subtitles," he says, turning onto our street.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Maya Gold: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a amizade. O trecho “Cat's friends seemed like very sweet girls," Dad says."They were the bomb," I say fervently, and …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amizade, funny, language pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e language.

frase_original: Cat's friends seemed like very sweet girls," Dad says."They were the bomb," I say fervently, and he looks back at me with raised eyebrows."'The bomb' is a good thing? Like 'sick'?"Duh," I reply, and Dad lets out a sigh."Thirteen-year-olds should come with subtitles," he says, turning onto our street.
